calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Jul-12-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY'S Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Erika McCartney's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Sunfood Corporation is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Order and Judgment signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-25-2018 Continued To Oct-09-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Inspection Demands 13 Through 16, And 21 Through 33
Off Calendar Sep-28-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert B. Hancock, Esq. of Pacific Justice Center, Tel. 415.310.1940, for plaintiff and moving party, by Court Call;
Julia M. Williams, Esq. of Teeple Hall, LLP, Tel. 858.622.7878, for defendant and opposing party, by Court Call.

Both parties stipulated to the judge pro tem.

RULING: The matter was argued. After hearing, the Court modified its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Inspection Demands 13 Through 16, And 21 Through 33 pursuant to the parties' stipulation and the rulings at the hearing. The Court shall prepare the order. Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2017 Set For Trial On Apr-16-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
